full_text:
Li Tong (Wenda) 李通 (文達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Tong (李通), styledWenda (文達), was born in Pingchun County, Jiangxia Commandery. An officer of Wei. Saved Cao Cao’s rearguard in the retreat from Zhang Xiu. Li Tong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Li Tong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
